summary: Head-unit map view force-closes with NullPointerException while drawing road and POI labels when name transliteration is enabled
description: The in-vehicle navigation map crashes intermittently while panning or zooming across areas whose road and place names are stored in a non-Latin script (e.g. Cyrillic or Greek). It only happens when the map display setting is configured to transliterate names into the Latin alphabet - with transliteration turned off the same tiles render fine. The crash lands on the background map-draw thread the moment the label layer tries to lay out and wrap a label whose text became null after the transliteration pass, so the whole app process is killed and the map goes black until the head unit relaunches it. Repro: enable 'display names in Latin script', navigate to a region with Cyrillic/Greek labels, and pan around for ~15s until a label with an unmappable character scrolls into view. Attaching the FATAL EXCEPTION captured from logcat on the head unit (Android 14).

logs.content:
FATAL EXCEPTION: MapDrawThread-3
Process: com.example.mapsapp, PID: 8123
java.lang.NullPointerException: Attempt to invoke virtual method 'int java.lang.String.length()' on a null object reference
	at com.example.mapsapp.render.TextRenderer.drawWrappedText(TextRenderer.java:293)
	at com.example.mapsapp.render.TextRenderer.drawTextOverCanvas(TextRenderer.java:224)
	at com.example.mapsapp.render.MapVectorRenderer.generateNewBitmap(MapVectorRenderer.java:271)
	at com.example.mapsapp.render.MapTileLayer.updateMapTile(MapTileLayer.java:388)
	at com.example.mapsapp.MapActivity$MapRenderTask.run(MapActivity.java:1442)
	at android.os.Handler.handleCallback(Handler.java:958)
	at android.os.Handler.dispatchMessage(Handler.java:99)
	at android.os.Looper.loopOnce(Looper.java:230)
	at android.os.Looper.loop(Looper.java:319)
	at android.os.HandlerThread.run(HandlerThread.java:67)
